home.diffLead: Four structural principles - not a marketing pitch.

differentiation.title: Training & education specialists
differentiation.body: We are not consulting generalists. All of our expertise is concentrated on a single field: training and skills development.

differentiation.title: Full-stack approach
differentiation.body: From strategy to operational execution. We don't deliver recommendations without implementing them.

differentiation.title: Compensation tied to your results
differentiation.body: A variable share linked to measured performance. We perform when you perform - that's what structurally distinguishes us from a consulting firm.

differentiation.title: Real intervention on the ground
differentiation.body: No deliverables without follow-through. Our work is measured by actual deployment, not by slide decks.

home.promiseBody: Our model is based on variable compensation aligned with results. We have no interest in delivering a recommendation you can't apply.
home.promiseSig: - That's what structurally sets us apart from a consulting firm.
home.proofNote: Representative indicators - every mission is calibrated and measured against its own KPIs.

faq.title: What you want to know before the first meeting.
faq.lead: Six questions, six direct answers. No pitch, no marketing promises, just what you need to decide whether Mentivis belongs in your project.

items.question: Are you a consulting firm?
items.answer: Yes. Mentivis is a specialist firm focused on training and education. The difference shows up after the recommendation: we don't just deliver slides, we actually implement, and we stay until your project is complete. Advice plus execution is what makes us an operator, not a consultancy.

items.question: Who is Mentivis for?
items.answer: Companies that want to turn training into a real performance lever (internal academies, structured learning programs, upskilling) and training providers that need to structure, secure compliance, or grow. From founders launching a new training company to large corporations, in the US, France, and internationally.

items.question: How do you charge?
items.answer: A fixed portion covers design and execution. A variable portion, tied to KPIs defined with you upfront, unlocks the rest of our compensation. If the agreed results aren't met, we don't collect our full fee. Our profitability depends on yours.

items.question: How long does an engagement take?
items.answer: Six weeks to fully structure a training company. Six to nine months to build an internal academy or a school from the ground up. Every engagement has a fixed scope, clear milestones, and a defined endpoint. No projects that drag on.

items.question: Why don't you list your clients on the website?
items.answer: Because they don't want us to. Building competing structures, strategic repositioning, internal academy launches, pedagogical transformation: most of our work is confidential by nature. Discretion isn't a marketing line, it's a contractual obligation. Relevant references are shared in person, during the first meeting.

items.question: What does a first contact look like?
items.answer: A free, no-obligation conversation. We analyze your need, validate whether a Mentivis engagement makes sense, and, if we're aligned, deliver a clear proposal: scope, milestones, KPIs, fee structure. If we're not the right partner, we tell you.

home.finalCtaLead: First exchange with no commitment, analysis of your needs and clear positioning on our ability to support you.

of.heroLead: Creation, compliance, growth - Mentivis supports training organizations at every stage, from initial structuring to performance steering.
of.pillarsLead: A clearer, more actionable services architecture.

pillars.title: Strategy
pillars.body: Position your TO on the market, structure its growth and secure its financing.
items: Positioning audit and competitive analysis
Program development and new offer launches
Financing engineering (CPF, OPCO, Region, FSE)
Go-to-market and commercial strategy
Marketing and communication of the training offer

pillars.title: Operations
pillars.body: Take over key functions to free your pedagogical teams and accelerate growth.
items: Acquisition: lead generation, conversion funnels, prescribers
Apprenticeship: administrative management, employer relations, OPCO
Communication: brand positioning, content, digital visibility
Instructional content: e-learning modules, materials, assessments

pillars.title: Administrative
pillars.body: Secure regulatory compliance and lighten the administrative load.
items: Activity declaration and initial compliance setup
Qualiopi preparation and follow-up: mock audit, action plan, audit presence
Pedagogical and Financial Report (BPF): collection, entry, filing
Learner files management and continuous compliance

pillars.title: End-to-end creation
pillars.body: Design and launch a complete training entity, turnkey, from zero.
items: Pedagogical project and economic model definition
Legal and administrative structuring (declaration, certifications)
Operational processes and management tools setup
Initial commercial deployment and activity launch

of.externalisedLead: Take over key functions to free the pedagogical team. This offer is distinct from advisory and structuring: Mentivis runs it, the TO focuses on its core business.
of.paymentBody: Variable compensation aligned with the results obtained. Guaranteed alignment of interests: we perform when you perform. That's what structurally differentiates this model from a classic engagement.
results: Structured pedagogical offer, credible on the market
Robust organization, less dependent on improvisation

enterprise.pillarsLead: A clear offer aligned with what business directors actually need.

pillars.title: Strategy
pillars.body: Build the training vision and the foundations to steer skills development long term.
items: HR audit and training diagnosis: status, gaps, priorities
Feasibility studies: target model, resources, financial viability
Financing engineering (OPCO, skills development plan)
Definition of skills paths and career tracks

pillars.title: Operations
pillars.body: Move from strategy to execution: we design and deploy the concrete programs.
items: Training creation: instructional design, content, assessments
Operational rollout: facilitation, team support, tooling
Declarations and regulatory compliance (Qualiopi if applicable, BPF)
Support for HR teams and managers in adoption

pillars.title: Administrative
pillars.body: Handle administrative and regulatory complexity so your teams can focus on results.
items: Training files management and OPCO relations
Regulatory compliance and legal obligations follow-up
Budget steering and training reporting

pillars.title: Entity creation
pillars.body: Build your internal or external training entity from scratch - TO, CFA, specialized school.
items: Internal TO: structure an academy or corporate school
External TO: create an independent training organization
CFA: file preparation, accreditation, apprenticeship rollout
Specialized school: positioning, certification, commercial launch

results: Programs that are actually used, measurable and lasting
Training aligned with business stakes and HR objectives
Reduced wasteful spend, better use of financing

Integration with your HR systems (SIRH, ATS, business tools)

Automation of administrative processes

sectorsTitle.title: We know your terrain.
sectorsTitle.lead: Every sector has its regulators, its constraints, its business vocabulary. We don't discover them when we arrive on your project.

sectors.title: Financial Services & Insurance
sectors.body: Regulatory transformation (DORA, PSD3), AI agents for case processing, KYC/AML, core banking modernization, open banking.

sectors.title: Industry & Manufacturing
sectors.body: Production process transformation, MES, predictive maintenance, VR safety training, industrial IoT, OT/IT convergence.

sectors.title: Health & Life Sciences
sectors.body: Digitalization strategy, HDS hosting, HL7/FHIR interoperability, diagnostic AI, MDR compliance, augmented patient record.

sectors.title: Public Sector & Defense
sectors.body: Digital sovereignty, critical IT system transformation, ANSSI certification, SecNumCloud, service dematerialization.

sectors.title: Energy & Utilities
sectors.body: Transformation toward energy efficiency, AI network optimization, automated ESG reporting, predictive maintenance.

sectors.title: Telecoms & Media
sectors.body: Platform modernization, AI personalization, immersive experiences.

sectors.title: Retail & Consumer Goods
sectors.body: Omnichannel transformation, 3D configurators, AI personalization, intelligent supply chain.

sectors.title: Transport & Logistics
sectors.body: Fleet optimization, demand prediction, predictive maintenance.

She ensures coordination between business and technical teams, from initial scoping to implementation follow-up.

landing.sub: 10 minutes to reveal the real maturity of your training system, measure the gap between what you think you control and what actually happens, and quantify the value you let leak every year.
landing.feat1Desc: From strategic alignment to regulatory compliance, including ROI and funding.
landing.feat2Desc: Including 12 proof questions that confront perception with process reality.
landing.feat3Desc: Diagnostic, risks, opportunities, three-tier action plan and quantified loss estimate.

qual.title: A few details to calibrate your assessment
qual.sub: This data lets us adapt the analysis to your context and quantify the opportunities identified with precision.

trans.sub: Computing scores and generating the diagnostic

dash.radarDesc: The solid polygon represents process reality. The lighter dashed polygon represents your declared perception. The gap between the two is the most profitable territory for improvement.
dash.quadDesc: Each dimension positioned by estimated improvement effort (X axis) and strategic weight (Y axis). The top left quadrant concentrates quick wins.
dash.funnelTitle: Where your budget converts and where it leaks
dash.funnelDesc: Projection from your declared annual training budget. Each step applies a conversion ratio computed from your real scores. The final line represents business impact actually generated.

cta.title: The diagnostic is set. Time to decide and execute.
cta.sub: A Mentivis consultant can reach out within 48 hours to turn the report findings into a quantified action plan.
cta.name: Name
cta.success: Thank you. Your request has been recorded. A consultant will contact you within 48 hours.
cta.consent: I agree to receive information from Mentivis, in accordance with the
cta.scenariosTitle: Choose the scope that matches your stakes

funnel.impactSub: Value effectively generated for the company

scenarios.tier1Desc: Compliance, funding, quick wins. Ideal if your score is below 50 on compliance or funding.
scenarios.tier2Desc: Training system, governance, tooling. Suited if your global score sits between 40 and 70.
scenarios.tier3Desc: Training as a business lever, strategic integration, full design. For organizations ready to step up.
scenarios.tier3It1: Alignment of training with business strategy

blockDesc.STRAT: How much is training tied to the company's business strategy?
blockDesc.SKILL: What level of knowledge do you have of real skill gaps in your teams?
blockDesc.SYS: How is training structured, delivered and evaluated in your organization?
blockDesc.ROI: Do you measure the actual impact of training on performance?
blockDesc.FUND: Do you master the funding levers of professional training?
blockDesc.COMP: Are you up to date on legal obligations and able to respond to an audit?

pdf.summaryIntro: This assessment measures the maturity of {company}'s training system across six key dimensions. It combines declarative self-assessment with proof questions, allowing us to objectify the gap between perception and process reality.
pdf.summaryScore: The global score of {score} out of 100 positions your organization at the {level} level.
pdf.summaryGap: The {gap} point gap between your perception and reality indicates {gapInterpretation}.
pdf.summaryWeakest: The weakest dimension is {weakest} with a score of {weakestScore} out of 100.
pdf.summaryStrongest: The strongest is {strongest} with a score of {strongestScore} out of 100.
pdf.summaryGapLow: good clarity on your training system
pdf.summaryGapMid: a moderate gap that warrants attention
pdf.summaryGapHigh: a significant disconnect between your convictions and your real processes
pdf.scoringSubtitle: The radar below overlays your declared perception and the reality adjusted by proof questions. Reading the gaps by dimension reveals where executive intuition diverges most from operational functioning.
pdf.diagIntro: Strategic synthesis generated from the score combinations observed in your organization.
pdf.valueIntro: Projection of how your annual training budget converts into effective business value. Each conversion ratio is computed from your real scores.
pdf.valueLossLabel: Estimated value loss across the full cycle
pdf.valueLossSub: Difference between the initial budget and business impact actually generated.
pdf.planIntro: Three intervention levels available depending on your stakes and current maturity level. The recommended scenario is highlighted.
pdf.planContact: To discuss implementation, reach out to your Mentivis contact.

careers.title: Careers
careers.lead: You share our belief that training is a strategic lever? Send us your application. We recruit passionate, curious profiles driven by impact.
careers.aboutBody: At Mentivis, we believe that diversity of backgrounds is our greatest strength. We recruit talent from education, consulting, digital, finance, and entrepreneurship. Each profile brings a unique perspective that enriches our ability to innovate for our clients.
careers.equityBody: Equity, inclusion, and accountability are not buzzwords. We practice transparent compensation, bias-free recruiting processes, and a flexible remote-work policy that places trust at the center of the relationship.
careers.marieQuote: We look for profiles who want to build, not just execute. If you are hungry for impact and autonomy, you will feel at home.
careers.ctaBody: Even if you don't find your dream role, send us a spontaneous application. We are always looking for exceptional talent to strengthen the team.
careers.formSub: Fill in the form below and attach your CV. We review every application carefully.
careers.fallback: The form is temporarily unavailable. Please send your application directly to contact​@​mentivis​.​com

opco.title: How much can your OPCO fund?
opco.sub: 73% of companies do not use their OPCO rights. This calculator estimates your funding potential for training projects and internal Campus creation.
opco.infoBody: The OPCO contribution represents 0.55% to 1% of your payroll. A substantial part of this effort can be mobilized to finance your training projects.
opco.emailError: Please use a business email address.
opco.contactTitle: Your details to receive the diagnostic
opco.rgpd: Data protection: the information collected is used solely to provide your personalized diagnostic and to contact you if you wish. In accordance with the GDPR, you have the right to access, rectify and delete your data.
opco.disclaimer: Methodology: calculation based on 2025 OPCO contribution rates (0.55% to 1% of payroll depending on headcount), FNE-Training mechanisms, France 2030, and regional aid. Actual amounts depend on your affiliated OPCO, collective agreement and project eligibility.
opco.ctaSub: Mentivis can support you in mobilizing these funds.
opco.ctaSuccess: Thank you. Your request has been recorded. A consultant will contact you within 48 hours.
opco.ctaConsent: I agree to receive information from Mentivis, in accordance with the
